description: Calculate the proportional tip distribution for a restaurant in /home/ga/Documents/tip_pool_week42.xlsx. On the 'Summary' sheet, document the 'Total_Hours', 'Points', 'Point_Hours', and 'Tip_Payout' for the 32 employees (Rows 4-35) using headers in Row 3 (D3:G3). The 'Total_Hours' must be derived from the 'Daily_Hours' sheet and 'Points' from the 'Role_Points' sheet. Each employee's 'Tip_Payout' is their proportional share of the $15,450.25 total tip pool (cell B1) based on their 'Point_Hours'. Format the payouts to 2 decimal places and save the file.
